EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IFeatureClass

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that control the behavior and properties of a feature class.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("D4803EE6-79F4-11D0-97FC-0080C7F79481")]
public interface IFeatureClass : IObjectClass, IClass
